title: QUILL Agent Catalog entry (quill.agent/1)
description: A declarative agent the AI Hub can list and any harness can run (PRD section 13). QUILL ships no jsonschema runtime dependency; quill/core/ai/agent_catalog.py is the authority that actually enforces this contract, and tests assert the two agree.

schema.description: Schema discriminator; must be exactly quill.agent/1.

id.description: Stable agent id, lowercase dotted/dashed segments.

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in the Hub catalog.

description.description: One-line summary of what the agent does.

risk.description: Agent risk level; the Permission Broker floors decisions by it.

default_scope.description: Default Context Builder scope for this agent.

recommended_file_types.description: File extensions/types this agent is recommended for (no leading dot).

default_harness.description: Preferred harness id, or 'auto' to let the registry choose.

tools.description: Command ids the agent is expected to use; still floored to SAFE_TOOL_IDS at call time.

permissions.description: Per-category permission overrides fed to the broker (the broker floor still wins).
